{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Pioneer workers
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Pioneer workers]] are the people [[Mercy]] and [[Fury]] are interacting with.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
